opening_plan: Prefer going second when Cinderace is available during setup.
Use Turbo Flare to fund Dragapult/Azelf Bench routes, never as an isolated 50-damage attack.
Buddy-Buddy Poffin establishes Dreepy plus Duskull/Azelf before committing evolution resources.
midgame_plan: Establish Dragapult through Drakloak or Rare Candy without consuming every Candy on one line.
Phantom Dive creates active pressure and a distributed counter reservoir.
Use Dusknoir/Dusclops only when the self-KO advances Prize mapping or creates a terminal sequence.
endgame_plan: Prime Catcher is the preferred Cinderace-to-Dragapult handoff plus gust action.
Azelf converts total opposing damage counters into a one-Prize lethal route.
Boss's Orders is reserved for a confirmed Prize conversion rather than generic disruption.

search_package.reason: Replace discard-heavy generic search with role-specific tutors for two Stage 2 lines.

rejected_from_baseline: Three Ultra Ball package: too much hand destruction for a deck carrying setup-only Cinderace copies.
Two Rare Candy package: insufficient shared transition capacity for Dragapult and Dusknoir.
Judge/Xerosic main-deck slots before consistency is proven.
Special Energy that cannot pay both colored Phantom Dive requirements.
